scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:lan: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev:lan --prefix client"
scripts.start:prod: npm run build && concurrently "npm run start --prefix server" "npm run preview --prefix client"
scripts.pm2:start: npm run build && pm2 start server/ecosystem.config.cjs
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
